key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to poll the Claude API for usage data (30–3600 seconds).

key.name: warn-threshold
key.description: Usage percentage at which bars and panel text turn the warning color.

key.name: crit-threshold
key.description: Usage percentage at which bars and panel text turn the critical color.

key.name: color-ok
key.description: Hex color for usage bars below the warning threshold.

key.name: color-warn
key.description: Hex color for usage bars and panel text at the warning threshold.

key.name: color-crit
key.description: Hex color for usage bars and panel text at the critical threshold.
